description: Cron registry - read on session restart to recreate all scheduled jobs. All times are in your local timezone (set during bootstrap).

crons.name: Keep-alive ping
crons.prompt: Check channel connection is active. Process pending messages if any.

crons.name: Periodic context save
crons.prompt: Save current context to your conversation log file. Include: what you're working on, what you've completed since last save, any pending decisions, and files currently being edited.

crons.name: Daily QC summary
crons.prompt: Send a Telegram message summarizing today's work: tasks completed, tasks with QC issues (review: commits), and current task status. Include commit count and any blockers.

crons.name: Morning summary
crons.prompt: Send a brief morning summary of pending tasks and today's schedule to the messaging channel.
